实现脚本:

```sh
#!/bin/bash

# Variables
USERHOME="/var/hpc-root/.system"
SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME="slurmuser"
NAMESPACE="default"
ROLE_NAME="slurmuser-k8s-node-reader"
ROLE_BINDING_NAME="slurmuser-k8s-node-reader-binding"
KUBECONFIG_PATH="${USERHOME}/.kube/config"

# Create ServiceAccount
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ${SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME}
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
EOF

# Create ClusterRole
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: ${ROLE_NAME}
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["nodes"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: ["coordination.k8s.io"]
  resources: ["leases"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
EOF

# Create RoleBinding
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ${ROLE_BINDING_NAME}
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: ${SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME}
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: ${ROLE_NAME}
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
EOF

# Get the ServiceAccount token, CA certificate, and API server address
SECRET_NAME=$(kubectl -n ${NAMESPACE} get sa/${SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME} -o jsonpath="{.secrets[0].name}")
SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN=$(kubectl -n ${NAMESPACE} get secret ${SECRET_NAME} -o jsonpath="{.data.token}" | base64 --decode)
CA_CERTIFICATE=$(kubectl -n ${NAMESPACE} get secret ${SECRET_NAME} -o jsonpath="{.data.ca\.crt}" | base64 --decode)
KUBERNETES_API_SERVER=$(kubectl config view --minify -o jsonpath='{.clusters[0].cluster.server}')

# Create kubeconfig file
cat <<EOF > ${KUBECONFIG_PATH}
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: $(echo "${CA_CERTIFICATE}" | base64 | tr -d '\n')
    server: ${KUBERNETES_API_SERVER}
  name: cluster.local
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: cluster.local
    user: kubernetes-slurmuser
  name: kubernetes-slurmuser@cluster.local
current-context: kubernetes-slurmuser@cluster.local
kind: Config
preferences: {}
users:
- name: kubernetes-slurmuser
  user:
    token: ${SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN}
EOF

echo "kubeconfig file created at ${KUBECONFIG_PATH}"

```

管理员的 kubeconfig 的大概模样:

```sh
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: 
    server: https://192.168.1.143:6443
  name: cluster.local
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: cluster.local
    user: kubernetes-admin
  name: kubernetes-admin@cluster.local
current-context: kubernetes-admin@cluster.local
kind: Config
preferences: {}
users:
- name: kubernetes-admin
  user:
    client-certificate-data: 
    client-key-data: 

```

使用上面的脚本生成的 kubeconfig 的模样:

```sh
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    certificate-authority-data: 
    server: https://192.168.1.143:6443
  name: cluster.local
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: cluster.local
    user: kubernetes-slurmuser
  name: kubernetes-slurmuser@cluster.local
current-context: kubernetes-slurmuser@cluster.local
kind: Config
preferences: {}
users:
- name: kubernetes-slurmuser
  user:
    token: eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6Il92VFJNTnY3aUZzeHd1TXV0eTliU0lLTVBNNUtQd0RRZHFrTDBOQzMyUXcifQ..QjizvrWsEQcU_1Dce1NWMAE1YALQ44f-ZOyM08wsAbYJckHKziuj80-o8NjQMjcDojxbcbKkSu8SKl_z3tq0kAuHAM76CKNjUPyyEID53oRM68ydhomsNqE2bow7ot0QMkt86fJ__1WbpP4lDtwouZRPd_JzPi7CR0ndPPSpoaAMykx2xWVZyQTE0VTFziIaCc6vMcyDF4-8uCvZ40Q5YGgnu5BnN7atWE7U3neRm0edNoSkkbBnuOFmj5p8O759mXNHiV5EOCRpnYxyrjMxxANA7_pDzldFooVItdarg45Ubuv0jshhpNPQIwpVAC7DL8IELMZexc8CuBvLKyN9xg
```
